summary: V43.1 ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE comprehensive frontend testing complete. 24/26 tests passed. The user's main complaint about overlapping content when mixer panel is open has been RESOLVED - content area scrolls independently with panel open. Panel height is well under 35vh limit (75px actual vs 313px max). All navigation, realm skins, FX, text overlays, recording, export, and ME panel features working correctly.

minor.issue: 401 errors for unauthenticated requests - expected behavior for protected endpoints

issues: data-testid='panel-grab-handle' not found - panel closes via tab toggle instead
data-testid='fullscreen-btn' not found in mixer nav - may be in different location

context_for_next_testing_agent: V43.1 Same Plane Architecture verified. User's scroll issue RESOLVED - content-area has overflow:auto and scrolls independently when panel is open. Panel height is 75px (well under 35vh/313px limit). All 10 tool tabs working. Mixer hidden on /sovereign-hub and /auth. Realm skins auto-switch per module (amethyst-glow on /crystals, herb-garden on /herbology, oracle-temple on /oracle). Z-depth transitions are subtle/instant. Compliance footer contains 'Private Sovereign Trust'.

user_complaint_resolution.original_complaint: Stuff overlapping, lower part of breathing exercise page not working when mixer panel is open
user_complaint_resolution.resolution: RESOLVED - Content area scrolls independently with panel open. Panel height reduced to 75px (was 50vh, now well under 35vh). Content-area has flex:1 and overflow:auto. All content reachable by scrolling.

scroll_verification.oracle_draw_cards: Draw Cards button reachable by scrolling
